title: fritillaria lusitanica var. neglecta
intro: Fritillaria lusitanica var. neglecta, also known as the Lusitanian fritillary, is a type of flowering plant in the lily family (Liliaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. Fritillaria lusitanica var. neglecta has been used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, and to reduce fever. It is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, or added to herbal remedies to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
